name: Josephine 10x12 Shed Plan - A Gambrel-Roof Storage & Studio Shed with Timeless Barn Charm
open_features: A classic barn-inspired profile that provides higher interior headroom and a beautifully traditional silhouette.
Straightforward framing, simple roof structure, and clean detailing make this build approachable for beginners and rewarding for experienced builders.
Stained wood double doors with upper windows add curb appeal while offering wide access for tools, equipment, lawn gear, bikes, or project materials.
Warm horizontal wood siding, crisp white trim, lantern-style lighting, and a deep blue metal roof deliver a balanced blend of farmhouse charm and modern durability.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Josephine Shed Plan - a 10x12 classic barn-style storage and workspace solution designed for maximum interior volume, rustic charm, and everyday practicality. Featuring a signature gambrel roof, warm wood siding, and elegant double barn doors, the Josephine blends iconic farmhouse character with smart, compact functionality. Whether you're building a garden supply shed, mini workshop, hobby studio, or simply need an organized space for tools and o...
